name: Ding Dong XL
short_description: A fast-paced, neon-infused arcade game with simple one-button controls! Addictive, easy to learn, and perfect for quick sessions. Challenge yourself to beat your high score while waiting in queue for another game!
detailed_description:
Ding and Dong between the top and bottom of the screen as you dodge obstacles, collect points, and smash power-ups! Test your reflexes in this fast-paced arcade game and see how long you can survive.

🕹️ One-Button Gameplay – Tap to move from top to bottom (or vice versa). Time your moves carefully to avoid enemies and maximize your score!

🎮 Simple Yet Addictive Controls – Play with a keyboard, controller, or mouse for an intuitive pick-up-and-play experience.

🔥 Fast-Paced, Endless Arcade Action – The challenge ramps up as you go, keeping you on your toes with increasingly difficult obstacles.

💡 Close Call Bonus System – Earn extra points for near misses, rewarding risky playstyles.

🎭 Unlockable Cosmetic Skins – Customize your player with unique looks, including skins from other Adamvision Studios games.

👯 Dual Mode Challenge – Play with two buttons for an extra challenge or team up with a friend on the same controller for brain-bending co-op gameplay.

♾️ Infinite Mode for Experts – A special mode that pushes your skills to the limit with an incredibly difficult new challenge.

🏆 Steam Features – Achievements, Cloud Saves, Leaderboards, and Trading Cards

🎵 Unique Sound Design – A mix of my own mouth-made sound effects and royalty-free SFX from FreeSFX. Music by Difourks – "It's Complextro & Dance."

🌎 Available in 10 Languages – English, Russian, German, Simplified Chinese, Spanish, French, Italian, Portuguese, Japanese, and Korean.


I love making small, polished arcade games with simple mechanics that keep players coming back for "one more round." Ding Dong XL is designed as a pure score-chaser—easy to learn, tough to master, and endlessly replayable.

Your feedback means a lot to me! If you have any questions, issues, or just want to say hello, feel free to reach out via my website, discord or the forums.

Thanks for checking out Ding Dong XL—I hope you enjoy the game!

Adam Nickerson - Adamvision Studios
